_comment: Official Salesforce DX MCP server (@salesforce/mcp, Beta), local stdio. Read-only is enforced by (1) pinning --toolsets=data,users (removes metadata deploy / Apex / devops write tools) AND (2) a read-only permission set on the CLI-authenticated org user (see SETUP.md). Auth reuses the Salesforce CLI org — run `sf org login web` first. Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
